results.justification: 200-model systematic study of CL pretraining with 6 difficulty metrics covers the difficulty-annotated waypoint paradigm directly.
EXACT TWIN — sort instruction data by multi-metric difficulty + per-step competence-aware sub-curriculum selection IS the BFS-from-novice-frontier mechanism.
Curriculum-ordered sample selection covers the ordered-traversal-of-training-data paradigm.
Progressive difficulty escalation in pretraining covers the BFS-from-novice progression.
Experience replay with dynamics+skills for CL covers the songline 'inma replay' periodic revisit.
Replay-ratio consolidation in CL covers the periodic-revisit replay scheduling.
CPT/DAP/CFT survey taxonomy covers the difficulty-curriculum CL design space.
LLM-as-waypoint-planner covers the waypoint-graph traversal paradigm, applied to planning rather than training.
